title: How to Choose What Programming Languages to Learn?
summary: With all the programming languages available out there today, it can be hard to choose which programming languages to learn! Therefore I have published my own criteria for choosing what programming languages I choose to learn myself.
content:
With all the programming languages available out there today, it can be hard to choose which
                programming languages to learn! Therefore I have published my own criteria for choosing
                what programming languages I choose to learn myself.
